home.todayFocus: Complete one answer chain and keep fitness tracking simple.
home.todaySummary: English focuses on problem -> because -> if -> future action. Fitness focuses on bodyweight, training, food, sleep, and energy.

english.currentFocus: Say one complete chain before expanding: problem -> because -> if -> future action.

problems.problem: Answer stops after the main idea
problems.latestEvidence: 2026-06-20: generated practical solutions but still needed prompting for the full chain.
problems.improvementLooksLike: Main answers include problem, reason, consequence, and next action without Mika prompting.

problems.latestEvidence: because, if, and so were useful, but grammar was unstable.
problems.improvementLooksLike: Use because, if, and so in one short answer.

problems.latestEvidence: we will did it needed correction to we will do it.
problems.improvementLooksLike: Use base verb after will: I will check, we will do it.

problems.latestEvidence: 2026-06-19: used Let me say that another way independently.
problems.improvementLooksLike: Use one recovery phrase before Mika gives help in most sessions.

improvementLog.title: Full answer chain
improvementLog.detail: Vinson produced practical solutions; next focus is saying problem, reason, if-condition, and future action in one pass.

improvementLog.title: Recovery phrase use
improvementLog.detail: Used Let me say that another way independently, which is a useful repair strategy during Mika practice.

reviewSentences: If the restaurant is closed, I will change the plan.
If the restaurant was closed, I would change the plan.
It matters because the feeling is different when I'm on a date.
If there is a delay, I may need to prepare more options.
Next time, I will check in advance.
I'll try to make it work.

reviewCards.title: Plan changed
reviewCards.prompt: Say what you will do if the restaurant is closed.
reviewCards.answerHint: If the restaurant is closed, I will change the plan and check another option.

reviewCards.title: Real life status
reviewCards.prompt: Describe today's energy and one thing you need to do.
reviewCards.answerHint: Today I feel a little tired, so I need to keep my answer simple.

reviewCards.title: Will + base verb
reviewCards.prompt: Fix: We will did it tomorrow.

reviewCards.title: Because chain
reviewCards.prompt: Add a reason after your main idea.
reviewCards.answerHint: It matters because the feeling is different when I'm on a date.

reviewCards.title: Before Mika
reviewCards.prompt: Say one complete answer chain: problem -> because -> if -> future action.
reviewCards.answerHint: The problem is..., because..., if..., next time I will...

reviewCards.title: 30-second life update
reviewCards.prompt: Can you explain your real status today in English for 30 seconds?
reviewCards.answerHint: Start with today, add because, then finish with one future action.

jessicaReview.summary: Recent answers need a shorter because-to-action chain.
jessicaReview.next_focus: Complete one clear past-tense story before adding detail.

_entries.notes: Rest day. Keep food steady and watch sleep.

jessicaReview.summary: Recovery is acceptable; keep the next Plan A controlled and verify the final set.
jessicaReview.next_focus: Complete Plan A without exceeding the reviewed targets.

exerciseTargets.instructions: Only add the final rep if tempo stays controlled.
No momentum on the final set.
Pause at the bottom and keep the same volume.
Keep the hinge clean and lower slowly.
Hold the baseline while recovery is average.

exerciseTargets.exercise_name: 椅上撐體／窄距伏地挺身
exerciseTargets.instructions: Use a slow lowering phase and watch the wrists.
Control the pelvis and lowering phase.

planTargets.title: Plan A
planTargets.detail: Keep push-ups controlled and improve biceps third set by 1-2 reps when recovery is good.

planTargets.title: Plan B
planTargets.detail: Keep squat and hinge baseline; control leg raise lowering before adding reps.

planTargets.title: Nutrition
planTargets.detail: Training day: protein plus one carb serving after workout or at the next meal.
